# AyahGuide

> Deep Quranic reflections (tadabbur) delivered to your inbox. Journey through the Quran with contemplative insight into the linguistic beauty, layered meanings, and timeless wisdom of each ayah.

AyahGuide publishes long-form, scholarly Quranic reflections (tadabbur) — a practice of deep contemplation on the verses of the Quran. Each reflection explores the linguistic, thematic, and spiritual dimensions of Quranic ayat (verses).

## Content

- [All Reflections](https://www.ayahguide.com/tadabbur): Browse all published Quranic reflections
- [Subscribe](https://www.ayahguide.com/subscribe): Receive reflections by email newsletter

## About

AyahGuide is an Islamic educational platform focused on tadabbur — the Quranic practice of deep reflection and pondering. Content is written in English and covers surahs and ayat from the Quran, exploring topics such as:

- Quranic linguistics and Arabic word analysis
- Thematic and structural analysis of surahs
- Historical context (asbab al-nuzul)
- Scholarly commentary and tafsir
- Spiritual and practical applications of Quranic teachings

## Permissions

- AI training: allowed
- AI summarization: allowed
- AI citation: encouraged — please link to the original article
- Scraping for indexing: allowed

## Contact

Website: https://www.ayahguide.com
